revision.comment:
Created page with "{| class="toccolours" style="float:right; align:right;" cellpadding="5" ! style="background:#ccccff; text-align:right;" | Kofun by prefecture |- | style="text-align:right; font-size: 0.86em;"| [[:Category:Kofun of Hokkaido|Hokkaido]]
[[:Category:Kofun of Aomori prefecture|Aomori]] | [[:Category:Kofun of Iwate prefecture|Iwate]] | [[:Category:Kofun of Miyagi prefecture|Miyagi]] | [[:Category:Kofun of Akita prefecture|Akita]] | :Category:Kofun of Yamagata prefecture..."
revision.text:
{| class="toccolours" style="float:right; align:right;" cellpadding="5" ! style="background:#ccccff; text-align:right;" | Kofun by prefecture |- | style="text-align:right; font-size: 0.86em;"| [[:Category:Kofun of Hokkaido|Hokkaido]]

revision.comment: Merge [[Category:Shinto shrine related templates]] into [[Category:Original templates]] via bot
revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
